case_title: CITY CENTER ASSOCIATES, A TENANCY IN COMMON et al VS CARLSON, THOMAS R. AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY CENTER ASSOCIATES, A TENANCY IN COMMON NOILY, SAMUEL, CO-MANAGING C0-OWNER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARLSON, THOMAS R.
